title: palicourea paradichroa
intro: Palicourea paradichroa is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, commonly known as the "Methanol tree" due to its toxic properties. The plant contains alkaloids, including palicoureine and paradichroine, which have been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Palicourea paradichroa include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help in treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or extracts, although caution is advised due to its toxicity and potential side effects.
